title: ARE Calc State v1
description: Normalized data object that fully describes one calculation. Written and read by Revit (pyRevit), saved server-side by /api/calc/run, and consumed by the SVG diagram renderer. Schema discriminator is the literal 'are.calc.v1'. The 'connection' block is per-calcType and selected by 'calcType'.

schema.description: Schema discriminator. Must equal the literal string 'are.calc.v1'.

calcType.description: Calculator slug from app/lib/calcs.ts. Determines which 'connection' detail block applies.

id.description: Permanent instance id (server-assigned). Drives the saved-calc URL. Omitted/null on POST input; populated on GET output.

connection.description: Per-calcType detail block. Validated by the oneOf below, keyed on calcType.

member.description: The element being designed. For connection calcs, 'section' is the primary/designed member (beam for w-to-hss-column, column for base-plate, branch for hss-to-hss-branch). Secondary members live in the connection block.

mark.description: Revit element Mark (free text identifier, e.g. 'B-12').

section.description: AISC manual label, UPPERCASE, matching the 'AISC_Manual_Label' key. W-shapes resolve from public/data/aisc-shapes-v16.json; HSS resolve from the runtime xlsx. Examples: 'W18X50', 'HSS10X10X1/2', 'HSS10.000X0.500'.

demands.description: Factored (LRFD) design demands. Units are FIXED per the table below; the HSS-to-HSS branch calc uses kip-IN for moments (not kip-ft) - see spec doc.

Mu.description: Factored moment. UNITS: kip-ft for w-to-hss-column and base-plate; kip-IN for hss-to-hss-branch (in-plane). See spec.

geometry.description: Member-level geometry. All lengths in INCHES. Optional for pure connection calcs.

results.description: Written by the calc engine. In v1 (store-only) dcr/status/governing may be null until a server-side engine exists for the calcType.

governing.description: Governing limit state, e.g. 'HSS Wall Local Yielding (Eq. K1-7)'.

status.description: Overall pass/fail. PENDING when no server engine has run.

connection_wToHss.title: W-Beam to HSS Column connection (slug w-to-hss-column)
connection_wToHss.description: Directly-welded W-beam moment connection to an HSS column. member.section = W-beam (primary/designed). 'column' holds the HSS chord. Moment is carried as a flange-force couple Puf = Mu/(d - tf).

column.description: HSS column (chord) receiving the beam flange force.

Fy.description: HSS yield stress, ksi. Default 46 (A500 Gr.B/C). Limit <= 52 ksi per K1.3.

beamFy.description: Beam flange yield Fyb, ksi. Default 50 (A992).

connection_basePlate.title: Column Base Plate connection (slug base-plate)
connection_basePlate.description: Steel column base plate on concrete per AISC DG1 + ACI 318-19 Ch.17. member.section = the column (W or HSS). All plate/anchor lengths in INCHES.

plate.description: Base plate. N x B x tp, inches. Fyp ksi.

N.description: Plate length (along column depth axis), in.

gauge.description: Bolt-to-bolt spacing sg, in (used for breakout cone area).

cEdge.description: Min concrete edge distance to nearest anchor center, in. Default 18.

connection_hssToHss.title: HSS-to-HSS Branch connection (slug hss-to-hss-branch)
connection_hssToHss.description: Rectangular or round HSS branch directly welded to an HSS chord, T/Y/X (and K for truss). member.section = the BRANCH (designed). 'chord' holds the through member. NOTE: branch moments in demands are kip-IN (this calc's native unit).

subType.description: Which engine path. 'rect-moment' (Rectangular Moment T/Y/X), 'round-moment' (Round Moment T/Y/X), 'truss' (axial K2).

Fy.description: Chord yield, ksi. Default 46 rect / 42 round.

theta.description: Branch angle to chord, degrees. Default 90.

Qf.description: Chord stress interaction factor Qf (dimensionless). Default 1.00.

orient.description: Rect branch in-plane orientation: 'H' (strong axis) or 'B' (weak axis).

gap.description: K-gap g, in (negative = overlap). Truss/K only.
